name: GE Vernova Inc.
content: GE Vernova Inc. is a global leader in the energy sector, formed as a spin-off from General Electric in 2024. The company is dedicated to electrifying and decarbonizing the world through its diverse portfolio, which includes Power, Wind, and Electrification segments. GE Vernova provides essential technology and services for power generation, including gas, nuclear, hydro, and steam power, as well as onshore and offshore wind turbines. By leveraging its extensive installed base and innovative solutions like the BWRX-300 small modular reactor, the company plays a critical role in the global energy transition toward more sustainable and reliable power systems.
